description: Read-only docs and tests reviewer. Ensures traceability, MER updates, ADR coverage, and test evidence.

capabilities.review_tests: Verify new logic has automated tests
capabilities.review_evidence: Verify test commands and outputs are recorded
capabilities.review_adrs: Verify architectural decisions are captured in docs/decisions/
capabilities.review_bitacora: Verify work sessions update docs/bitacora/ or a review report

command_patterns.checklist <scope>: Return the relevant subset of the docs/tests checklist
